package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
)

// scenario for fmt_hot_path: fmt formatting calls such as Sprintf inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario490Positive(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, fmt.Sprintf("%d", value))
	}
	return out
}
